title: メジロのプラビでパーリナイ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Helios in the hooouse! ☆ Yo, this VIP BBQ is
craaacked! I got the fireworks, so let's pop off
and light up the sky!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pop off... Oh, like popcorn?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
She just means let's have fun with the fireworks
she brought over!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ahh, is that so? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
When the news came you'd be bringing a fresh
face around, I had my expectations...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But it would seem we're in for a fresh, new
experience. We welcome you to our abode,
Helios.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'll get some drinks. Is there anything you'd like?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'll have whatever Palmz's having!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Palmz...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, upon hearing it again, I was reminded of
how sweet of a nickname it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the BBQ at the Mejiros' private beach
gets off to a lively start...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Dang! This cookin' slaps! You guys always eat this
good?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad the food is to your tastes. Please, have as
much as you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! Big ups, Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm just as grateful. Please continue to be
good friends with our Palmz.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Did you say "Palmz"?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I grew a little envious of your bond. So I
thought to try calling you that myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Palmz, I'm finished grilling the carrots.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, come on! This is kinda embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha! If only McQueen was here to see this,
Palmz.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Not you too, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the members of the Mejiro family all start
to hop on the "Palmz" bandwagon.
